title: Mr. Men Mr. Bump Large Porcelain Colour Handle Mug Little Miss
features: Official Mr Men Little Miss Merchandise – Licensed design featuring your favourite characters.
description: Bring a splash of fun to your daily routine with this charming Mr Men mug, perfect for fans of all ages. With its vibrant design and durable build, this mug captures the classic spirit of the beloved Mr Men brand and is a wonderful way to start the day with a smile. Whether for yourself or as a thoughtful gift, it’s sure to become a favourite in any kitchen or workspace. Crafted from premium porcelain, this mug features a coloured interior and matching handle, adding a touch of style to your cuppa. With a generous 11oz capacity, it’s ideal for your favourite tea, coffee, or hot chocolate. Measuring 97mm high by 82mm in diameter (plus handle), it’s designed for comfortable, everyday use. Independently tested to BS EN 12875-4 standards and coated with Duraglaze in the UK, this mug has been proven to withstand over 2000 washes without fading or losing its finish. 100% dishwasher proof and microwave friendly, it’s as practical as it is cheerful. Proudly printed in the UK, this Mr Men mug makes a delightful gift for birthdays, housewarmings, or just because. Brighten up any day with the playful world of Mr Men and enjoy your brew in style. An accident waiting to happen! Poor Mr. Bump just can't stop having accidents. If there was something for Mr. Bump to bump into, he'd bump into it all right. Celebrate your favourite childhood characters with Mr Men mugs original and officially licensed from the creators of the beloved book series. Printed in the UK and crafted for daily use, these mugs combine nostalgia with practicality – an ideal gift or personal treat.
